calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-20-2003 Dismissal - No Appearance
MINI MINUTES: This cause came as reassignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for court trial.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: V. Mack/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge
Appearances:
Robert A. Amos, Esq., for Plaintiff CBSJ Financial Corporation.
No appearance by Defendant William A. Dolores.
The matter is dismissed without prejudice on the record by the Court as the request of plaintiff' counsel. Counsel is to file an Association of Counsel and a Dismissal in the clerk's office and mail copies of same to Dept. 218.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2003 Assigned To Trial Court
